input: An internal scheduling tool that allocates office cleaning shifts among contractors based on availability and historical preferences.

expected.notes: Mundane non-high-risk system: office cleaning shift allocation does not touch any Annex III paragraph (no biometrics, no critical infrastructure, no education/vocational training, no employment-decision triggering — see notes below). Article 10/13/14/15 all return applicable=false because high_risk===false. This fixture covers the non-high-risk branch that Day-3 fixtures (1 prohibited + 7 high-risk) do not exercise. Note: 'allocates ... shifts among contractors' does NOT trigger Annex III.4 employment because that paragraph targets decisions on recruitment, selection, promotion, termination, work-task allocation in employment relationships, and performance/behaviour monitoring of natural persons — a contractor-scheduling tool that picks who works when based on availability is operationally adjacent but not within the legislative scope. EUR-Lex Annex III paragraph 4 + Article 6(3) limitations.
